Simple Process

HOW TO ORDER

01
Pick Your Design
Browse our collection of 20+ unique designs — from anime to abstract art. Or bring your own custom design.
02
Choose Size & Colour
Select your size (S–2XL) and preferred colour. T-shirts available in multiple colours. Totes in black & white.
03
Message on WhatsApp
Send us your order details on Facebook or WhatsApp. We'll confirm availability, finalise design, and arrange delivery.
04
Receive & Wear
We print, pack, and ship directly to you across Bangladesh. Standard delivery 3–5 working days.

2024
Est. in Dhaka
Our Story

WEAR YOUR
IDENTITY

GRABBED IT was born in the streets of Dhaka with one bold idea — that fashion should be as unique as the person wearing it. We started small, with a passion for anime, art, and self-expression, and turned it into Bangladesh's most exciting custom clothing brand.

Every piece we make is crafted on GSM-180 premium cotton using DTF (Direct-to-Film) printing — ensuring vibrant, long-lasting colour that survives wash after wash. We don't do generic. We do you.

Quality Guaranteed
GSM-180 cotton, wash-fast DTF prints
Fully Custom
Upload your own design or choose ours
Fast Delivery
Ships across Bangladesh in 3–5 days
Direct Support
Chat with us anytime on WhatsApp

SIZE GUIDE

Not sure about your size? Measure your chest at the widest point and refer to the chart above. If you're between sizes, we recommend sizing up for a relaxed fit. WhatsApp us and we'll help you choose!

Customer Love

WHAT PEOPLE SAY

Why Grabbed It

THE DIFFERENCE

GSM-180 Premium Cotton
Heavier, softer, and more durable than standard tees. Our fabric is pre-shrunk and breathable for all-day comfort.
DTF Print Technology
Direct-to-Film printing delivers photo-quality detail with exceptional colour accuracy. Prints stay vibrant wash after wash.
Fully Customisable
Choose from our growing catalogue or upload your own artwork. Bulk orders with custom branding also available.
Nationwide Delivery
We ship to every district in Bangladesh. Secure packaging ensures your order arrives in perfect condition within 3–5 days.
